Description: Overall composite score aggregating all pillars, scaled as deciles 1–10 with higher being better
Earnings pillar score (1–10 decile, higher is better), reflecting earnings quality, revisions, and growth
Fundamental score on a 1–10 decile scale, higher indicates stronger fundamental quality
Insider trading pillar score (decile 1–10), based on recent insider activity
Price momentum score on a 1–10 decile scale, higher indicates stronger recent price trend
Relative valuation score on a 1–10 decile scale, higher indicates more attractive valuation versus peers in the region
Risk pillar score, integer decile 1–10 where higher indicates a more favorable risk profile
